mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( author_id, author_name, title, description, image_url ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{title}, #{description}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS postId, author_name AS authorName, title, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM posts WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.author_id AS authorId, m.name AS authorName, m.email AS authorEmail, p.title, p.description, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM posts p JOIN members m ON m.id = p.author_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
